title: O/L Model Paper Examination – June 2025
content: A model paper examination will be held for all O/L students on June 7, 2025. All students must register before May 30. Examination fee is Rs. 500 per subject. Contact the office for more details.

title: New A/L Chemistry Batch Starting – June 2025
content: A new A/L Chemistry batch will commence on June 2, 2025 under Mr. Ruwan Jayasinghe. Classes will be held every Wednesday and Sunday. Early registration is open. Limited seats available.

title: Vesak Season Holiday Notice
content: Please note that all classes are suspended on May 12 and 13, 2025 in observance of Vesak. Classes will resume on May 14 as per the regular schedule.

title: Monthly Fee Payment Reminder
content: This is a reminder that monthly fees for May 2025 are due on or before May 10. A late fee of Rs. 200 will be charged after the due date. Please ensure timely payment to avoid disruption.

title: Special Revision Classes for A/L Students
content: Special revision classes for A/L 2025 candidates will begin from May 20. These intensive sessions will cover past paper analysis and exam technique. Attendance is strongly recommended for all A/L students.

title: Institute Library Now Open
content: We are pleased to announce that the institute library is now open to all enrolled students. The library houses over 500 reference books and past papers. Library hours: Weekdays 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM, Weekends 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM.
